creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The supported hardware section has been removed from the Handbook.  It 
was always out of date.  The most frequently maintained document for 
hardware compatbility are the release notes and hardware.txt document. 
Udo gave a reason why we might not want to list the SB Live! as fully 
supported in any document.  Thanks!
